---
title: "Inclusive Facilitation & Data Discovery"
---

## Overview

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under Construction

## Preparation

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

{{< include topics/thinking-styles.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/participation-access.qmd >}}
